reason: Verified that the agent successfully uses the GitHub tool to retrieve and display the authenticated user's GitHub username through the connected account flow.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing SuperAgent with three agents in the sidebar, including the target agent "QA-20260515-204642-ni4i" with "idle" status.
Clicked on the "QA-20260515-204642-ni4i" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened successfully, displaying agent landing page with message input field.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator confirmed the agent is in "idle" state, which is an acceptable status (running or idle).
Typed message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." into the input field — Message entered successfully and the Send button became enabled.
Clicked the Send button to submit the message — Message submitted successfully, agent transitioned to "working" status, and a new session "GitHub Username Identity Verification" was created.
Waited 3 seconds for a response — A card appeared asking "Allow access to GitHub to look up your username?" indicating agent is awaiting permission to access the GitHub account.
Clicked "Allow Access (1)" button to grant GitHub account access — GitHub account access was granted successfully, card dismissed, and agent resumed working status.
Waited 10 seconds for additional processing — A new card appeared asking for API permission: "Allow get the authenticated user?" with GitHub endpoint "GET /user".
Clicked the "Allow" button on the GitHub API permission dialog — Permission dialog opened showing multiple scope options.
Selected "Always allow read:user" permission option — Permission was granted with read:user scope, allowing the agent to read user profile data.
Waited for final response — Agent completed processing and returned response showing "Your GitHub username is yiw190." with status changed back to "idle" after 25 seconds total.

Took final screenshot documenting the GitHub username response — Screenshot captured showing the complete chat flow with all tool calls visible (Bash, ToolSearch, Request Connected Account, Fetch GitHub user info) and the final response with the GitHub username "yiw190".
